ham.subject: Re: Project X Status – Out of Office
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Thanks for the update on Project X. I will be out of office from 22nd March to 5th April and will not have access to my email during this period.

For any urgent matters, please reach out to Rahul at rahul@example.com or call +91-9876543210.

I will get back to you as soon as I return.

Best regards,
Aditi

spam.subject: Urgent: Account Locked – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Employee,

Our system has flagged suspicious activity on your corporate account. As a security measure, your account has been temporarily locked.

To unlock your account, please verify your identity by clicking the link below and entering your employee ID and password:

<URL>

If you do not verify within 15 minutes, your account will be permanently disabled. For assistance, contact the IT Helpdesk at support@example.com.

Regards,
IT Helpdesk Team
Ticket ID: 3421
